no_homestead.description: NC has no universal homestead exemption — signal disabled (not discriminatory)

value_500k_1m.description: Property value $500K-$1M — larger deals, fewer investors qualify

multi_family.description: Multi-family 2-4 units — higher rental income, better DSCR ratios

str_eligible_zip.description: Property in tourist zip code — STR strategy viable

absentee_out_of_state.description: Mailing address outside North Carolina — strong investor indicator

absentee_in_state.description: In-state but different zip from property — local investor

llc_corp_owned.description: LLC/Corp ownership — sophisticated investor, structured for DSCR

portfolio_5_plus.description: Portfolio landlord with 5+ properties — high-value target

portfolio_2_to_4.description: Portfolio landlord with 2-4 properties — growing investor

cash_purchase.description: Cash purchase, no mortgage — may want DSCR cash-out refi

recent_purchase_0_12mo.description: Purchased within last 12 months — active buyer

long_hold_no_refi.description: Owned 5+ years with no refinance — likely has equity to tap

tier_1.label: Hot Leads
tier_1.action: Immediate outreach — phone call + email + direct mail

tier_2.label: Warm Leads
tier_2.action: Email + direct mail sequence, phone if resources allow

tier_3.label: Nurture
tier_3.action: Add to long-term email nurture only

discard.label: Discard
discard.action: Do not outreach — insufficient investor signals

property_use_codes.note: NC uses text descriptions more than numeric codes. Use keyword matching in nc_02_parse_parcels.py.
